initiatives.name: Really Really Free Market Tallahassee
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community support through free markets and resource sharing in Tallahassee. They coordinate direct assistance, free item distribution, and solidarity networks while building power through community organizing and creating spaces for gift economy and collective care.

initiatives.name: Tallahassee Community Action Committee
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community solidarity through collective organizing in Tallahassee. They coordinate direct action support, political education, and solidarity networks while building power through community organizing and creating spaces for social justice and collective resistance.

initiatives.name: Food Not Bombs Tallahassee
initiatives.description: A mutual aid collective fostering food justice and community solidarity through free food sharing in Tallahassee. They coordinate regular meal distributions, food recovery initiatives, and solidarity networks while building power through direct action, community care, and creating spaces for food sovereignty and collective nourishment.

initiatives.name: Tally Dissenters
initiatives.description: We are an anti-militarist & anti-imperialist youth-led organization turning the tides to divest from war & empire.
